name: MSI MEG X670E GODLIKE E-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 3x PCIe 5.0 x16 - Support DDR5-6666+(OC) - 4x M.2 Slots - M.2 PCI-Express Card - 2x USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C - 10G Super LAN - 2.5G LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E - M-VISION Dashboard (X670EGODLIKE)
shortName: MSI MEG X670E GODLIKE E-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 3x PCIe 5.0
description: Flagship AMD AM5 E-ATX motherboard with triple PCIe 5.0 slots, DDR5 overclocking support, and 10G LAN for extreme builds.
